scene.message: Maki: Kandori...{wait_fr:88}{nl} Takahisa...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Ah! Why you~{nl} You drooling-bib man!{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: .........{wait_fr:88}{nl} What a noisy bunch...{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Shut up!{nl} Stop it, both of you!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Ha-ha!{nl} Monkey, monkey!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Hey, hey, Kurouri,{nl} was that the masked man?{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: ...{wait_fr:60}I told you{nl} not to bother with me.{waitkey}{ret}
From beyond the door comes{nl} an eerie pulsing...{waitkey}{ret}
